Duamta

Star System · First seen 3309-02-23 · 4 mentions
EDSM ↗ Inara ↗
Active: 3309-02-23 → 3310-10-18
System Overview

Duamta is a Federal corporate system with over thirteen billion inhabitants, a high-tech economy, and high security provided by the Duamta Gold Creative Corp. In February 3309, it was selected by the reformed Aegis as the production site for the caustic sink launcher, a module designed to protect ships in the caustic environments of Thargoid Maelstroms.

Professor Alba Tesreau coordinated an open order for advanced catalysers, heatsink interlinks, palladium and caustic tissue samples — the latter obtained from inside the Maelstroms themselves. The initiative drew contributions from the Alliance, Empire and Federation, demonstrating a rare moment of tri-superpower collaboration. Director Ivano Colombera of the Imperial Science Academy declared that Aegis had "immediately justified its reformation with this contribution to the war effort."

System Data
Coordinates: [2.1875, 6.625, -7]
Allegiance: Federation
Government: Corporate
Security: High
Economy: High Tech
Population: 13.3B
Controlling Faction: Duamta Gold Creative Corp.

Mentions Timeline (6 articles)
3310-10-18
'Significant Medical Emergency’ Strikes Seo Jin-ae
Aegis special advisor Seo Jin-ae suffers a violent seizure and falls into a coma at a medical facility in Duamta, with Aegis Head Alba Tesreau confirming the incident and revealing Seo's incredibly high brain activity while unconscious.
3309-05-01
Rackham Fundraiser Secures Political Backing
Zachary Rackham holds a lavish fundraiser revealing Anya Blackriver as campaign manager, celebrity endorsements, and Congressman Harlan Turk as running mate.
3309-03-02
Caustic Sink Launcher Aids Maelstrom Exploration
Aegis begins production of the caustic sink launcher, enabling longer survival in Maelstrom caustic clouds; next priority is the energy surge at Maelstrom centers.
3309-02-23
Aegis Launches Caustic Sink Launcher Initiative
Aegis requests resource deliveries in Duamta to fast-track mass production of the caustic sink launcher module.
3307-03-25
Medicines Delivered for Starport Bombing Survivors
*Pilots Federation ALERT* Safeguard Interstellar has successfully received medical supplies for civilians wounded during The NMLA terrorist attack.
3307-03-18
Medical Supplies Needed for Starport Bombing Survivors
*Pilots Federation ALERT* Safeguard Interstellar requires deliveries of medicines to treat casualties from The NMLA’s recent terrorist attack.
